records.m_Talk_ENG: Long time no see, stray cat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Long time no see, stray cat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Long time no see, stray cat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, I feel a little embarrassed talking to myself like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, I feel a little embarrassed talking to myself like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, I feel a little embarrassed talking to myself like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, did you notice? This is the recorder that Justine always carried around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, did you notice? This is the recorder that Justine always carried around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, did you notice? This is the recorder that Justine always carried around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's also the thing that holds all of your embarrassing moments.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's also the thing that holds all of your embarrassing moments.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's also the thing that holds all of your embarrassing moments.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But most of all, it's one of the few items... that holds any record of you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But most of all, it's one of the few items... that holds any record of you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But most of all, it's one of the few items... that holds any record of you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know my voice will never reach you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know my voice will never reach you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know my voice will never reach you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I think it's okay even if it doesn't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I think it's okay even if it doesn't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I think it's okay even if it doesn't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty years have passed since that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty years have passed since that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty years have passed since that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While I was asleep and you gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While I was asleep and you gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While I was asleep and you gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time goes by so fast, right? I heard a lot has happened in the meantime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time goes by so fast, right? I heard a lot has happened in the meantime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time goes by so fast, right? I heard a lot has happened in the meantime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The most shocking news of all was that the Administration had failed and a new Administration was established.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The most shocking news of all was that the Administration had failed and a new Administration was established.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The most shocking news of all was that the Administration had failed and a new Administration was established.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knew that the great Administration would go down like that, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who knew that the great Administration would go down like that, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knew that the great Administration would go down like that, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It makes me wonder what we were fighting for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It makes me wonder what we were fighting for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It makes me wonder what we were fighting for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And also what I was trying to force upon you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And also what I was trying to force upon you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And also what I was trying to force upon you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I'm not so sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I'm not so sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I'm not so sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To be honest, I don't remember much about that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To be honest, I don't remember much about that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To be honest, I don't remember much about that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People have told me that partial memory erasure can alleviate some of the mental contamination caused by Mental Printing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People have told me that partial memory erasure can alleviate some of the mental contamination caused by Mental Printing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People have told me that partial memory erasure can alleviate some of the mental contamination caused by Mental Printing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It also took a long time to rehabilitate my weakened body that had been frozen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It also took a long time to rehabilitate my weakened body that had been frozen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It also took a long time to rehabilitate my weakened body that had been frozen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, but don't worry. I'm better now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, but don't worry. I'm better now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, but don't worry. I'm better now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've always thought that I needed to apologize to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've always thought that I needed to apologize to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've always thought that I needed to apologize to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All those things I did, assuming that it was all for you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All those things I did, assuming that it was all for you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: All those things I did, assuming that it was all for you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: They ended up making you like that, in the end
records.m_Talk_DEU: They ended up making you like that, in the end
records.m_Talk_FRA: They ended up making you like that, in the end

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you'd just brush it off and laugh about it, but I think I need to take on the responsibility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you'd just brush it off and laugh about it, but I think I need to take on the responsibility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you'd just brush it off and laugh about it, but I think I need to take on the responsibility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, there aren't a lot of people who remember you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, there aren't a lot of people who remember you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, there aren't a lot of people who remember you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But me and the other members you saved will never forget about you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But me and the other members you saved will never forget about you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But me and the other members you saved will never forget about you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a member of the Yaksha Division, we will continue to carry on your will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a member of the Yaksha Division, we will continue to carry on your will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a member of the Yaksha Division, we will continue to carry on your will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And to do that, the first thing we started with was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And to do that, the first thing we started with was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And to do that, the first thing we started with was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I'm listening, Justine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I'm listening, Justine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I'm listening, Justine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I know. After all this time conducting searches.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I know. After all this time conducting searches.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I know. After all this time conducting searches.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never imagined that we'd discover this one in this depths.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never imagined that we'd discover this one in this depths.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never imagined that we'd discover this one in this depths.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Salvaging it might take a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Salvaging it might take a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Salvaging it might take a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Since the Administration can't help us anymore... we'll have to do it ourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Since the Administration can't help us anymore... we'll have to do it ourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Since the Administration can't help us anymore... we'll have to do it ourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you seeing this, stray cat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you seeing this, stray cat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you seeing this, stray cat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, it took too long, didn't it? But you hid it so well that we had a hard time finding it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, it took too long, didn't it? But you hid it so well that we had a hard time finding it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, it took too long, didn't it? But you hid it so well that we had a hard time finding it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But eventually, we did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But eventually, we did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But eventually, we did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The last legacy you left behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The last legacy you left behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The last legacy you left behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Lost Ship... <color=#ffd34c>Simurgh.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Lost Ship... <color=#ffd34c>Simurgh.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Lost Ship... <color=#ffd34c>Simurgh.</color>
